---
title: "Endpoint Translation and Staging"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

<!-- TODO (Slice L artifact pipeline):
  This article depends on inst/extdata/articles/myeloma_fits.rds.
  To unblock:
    1. Build the artifact (see myeloma-cta.Rmd TODO).
    2. Expand sections below with live translation function calls on the
       loaded myeloma MINDENOM=1 fit.
    3. Cross-reference all output values against docs/examples/myeloma-cta-translation.md.
-->

**Status:** Draft — precomputed artifacts not yet generated.
Once `inst/extdata/articles/myeloma_fits.rds` is available, this article will
demonstrate the full CTA translation pipeline on the myeloma MINDENOM=1 tree.

**Lean-fit invariant:** `cta_fit()` stores only tree nodes, `training_confusion`,
and per-leaf class counts. No training X/y, row indices, or staging tables are
stored at fit time. All translation artifacts below are computed on explicit
function call.

**Translation functions covered:**

| Function | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `cta_endpoint_summary()` | Tree structure, terminal endpoints, denominators |
| `cta_endpoint_counts()` | Raw and weighted counts per endpoint × class |
| `cta_staging_table()` | Target-class proportion, odds, perfect-endpoint flags |
| `cta_propensity_weights()` | Stabilised endpoint-level propensity weights |
| `cta_assign_endpoints()` | Row → endpoint assignment (traversal on demand) |
| `cta_observation_weights()` | Row → endpoint-level weight assignment |
| `cta_confusion_table()` | Training confusion and ESS from stored matrix |

**Source material:**

- `docs/CTA_TRANSLATION_STACK.md` — pipeline navigation and function map
- `docs/examples/myeloma-cta-translation.md` — worked numeric example with all values

---

## The lean-fit invariant

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_endpoint_summary()`: tree structure and denominators

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_endpoint_counts()`: raw and weighted counts per endpoint

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_staging_table()`: target-class proportions, odds, and flags

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_assign_endpoints()`: row-level endpoint traversal

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_observation_weights()`: row-level propensity weight assignment

*(To be expanded.)*

## `cta_propensity_weights()`: stabilised endpoint-level weights

*(To be expanded.)*
